name: Jalapeno Honey Mustard with Sun Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 to 4 tablespoons, seeded and chopped jalapeno pepper
2 to 4 tablespoons chopped sun-dried tomatoes, packed in oil (optional)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together mustard and flour in a saucepan until blended.
2. Whisk in water; let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in mustard seeds, vinegar, honey, and salt.
4. Bring mixture to simmering over medium heat, whisking constantly; cook for 2 minutes.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in jalapeno pepper and sun-dried tomatoes, if using.
6. Scrape into sterilized decorative glass jars.
7. Refrigerate for up to 2 months.
